s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SHOCK ABSORBER WITH COIL SPRING

s2.ptxt: Install the rear shock absorber with coil spring to the rear axle carrier assembly and insert the 2 bolts from the rear of the vehicle.
Slowly jack up the vehicle using a wooden block and install the rear shock absorber with coil spring (upper side) to the vehicle.
Install the 3 nuts to the upper side of the rear shock absorber with coil spring.
Install the 2 nuts and 2 bolts to the lower side of the rear shock absorber with coil spring.

atten3.ptxt: When installing the nuts, keep the bolts from rotating.

s2.ptxt: Fully tighten the lock nut.

s-1.ptxt: CONNECT REAR SPEED SENSOR

s2.ptxt: Install the rear brake flexible hose and rear speed sensor wire harness with the 2 bolts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR STABILIZER LINK ASSEMBLY LH

s2.ptxt: Install the rear stabilizer link assembly LH to the rear shock absorber with the nut.

atten4.ptxt: If the ball joint turns together with the nut, use a hexagon wrench (5 mm) to hold the stud.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SUSPENSION SUPPORT NO. 1 COVER

s2.ptxt: Engage the 4 claws and install the rear suspension support No. 1 cover.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR WHEEL
INSTALL REAR SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY (for Fixed Type)

s2.ptxt: Place the seat back in the cabin.

atten3.ptxt: Be careful not to damage the vehicle body.

s2.ptxt: Install the rear seat back assembly with the 4 bolts.
Pass the 3 seat belts through and close the cap of the 2 rear seat shoulder belt guides.
Install the floor anchor part with the bolt.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SEAT CUSHION ASSEMBLY (for Fixed Type)

s2.ptxt: Attach the 2 front hooks of the seat cushion to the vehicle body.
Confirm that the seat cushion is firmly installed.

atten3.ptxt: When installing the seat cushion, make sure the seat belt buckle is not under the seat cushion.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR CENTER SEAT HEADREST ASSEMBLY (for Fixed Type)
INSTALL REAR SEAT HEADREST ASSEMBLY (for Fixed Type)
INSTALL REAR SIDE SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY RH (for Fold Down Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Install the rear side seat back assembly with the bolt.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SIDE SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY LH (for Fold Down Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Install the rear side seat back assembly with the bolt.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SEPARATE TYPE REAR SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY RH (for Fold Down Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Install the separate type rear seat back assembly with the 2 bolts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SEPARATE TYPE REAR SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY LH (for Fold Down Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Install the separate type rear seat back assembly with the 2 bolts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SEAT CUSHION ASSEMBLY (for Fold Down Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Attach the front hooks of the bench type rear seat cushion assembly to the vehicle body.
Confirm that the seat cushion is firmly installed.

atten3.ptxt: When installing the bench type rear seat cushion assembly, make sure that the seat belt buckle is not under the bench type rear seat cushion assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR CENTER SEAT HEADREST ASSEMBLY (for Fold Down Seat Type)
INSTALL REAR SEAT HEADREST ASSEMBLY (for Fold Down Seat Type)
INSTALL SEPARATE TYPE REAR SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY RH (for Reclining Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Install the separate type rear seat back assembly RH with the 2 bolts and 2 nuts.
Engage the 3 clamps and install the cover.
Install the rear seat belt.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SEPARATE TYPE REAR SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY LH (for Reclining Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Install the separate type rear seat back assembly RH with the 2 bolts and 2 nuts.
Engage the 3 clamps and install the cover.
Install the rear seat belt.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SEAT BACK COVER (for Reclining Seat Type)
INSTALL REAR SEAT CUSHION ASSEMBLY (for Reclining Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Attach the front hooks of the bench type rear seat cushion assembly to the vehicle body.
Confirm that the seat cushion is firmly installed.

atten3.ptxt: When installing the bench type rear seat cushion assembly, make sure that the seat belt buckle is not under the bench type rear seat cushion assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SEAT HEADREST ASSEMBLY (for Reclining Seat Type)
CHECK ABS SPEED SENSOR SIGNAL
INSPECT AND ADJUST REAR WHEEL ALIGNMENT
